🖼️

External Resources

Eyas can load images, fonts, and scripts from external domains just like a standard browser. You can test this by enabling/disabling the network.

Current state: External images will be loaded from dummyimage.com after a delay.
WAITING (1s)

Small resource test.

WAITING (3s)

Medium resource test.

WAITING (5s)

Showcase for Eyas's network blocking.

Try it now

Go to Developer Tools → Go Offline and then Reload this page to see how the runner blocks external resources while keeping your build directory reachable.
